mission.title: open-policy-agent-opa-: Decisionlog droprule
mission.description:
We picked up the work at #5053.

This will be used to drop events before they are logged, specified by a drop decision rule.

Fixes: #3945

resolution.summary: Would you mind checking that rebase? It looks like a few unrelated commits have snuck in.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
